goal: Fail once, persist recovery, retry the same task, then complete it.
title: Recover failed task through retry
validation_commands: python3 -B -c "from pathlib import Path; missing=[p for p in ['recovery/output.txt'] if not Path(p).is_file()]; assert not missing, missing"
python3 -B -c "from pathlib import Path; text=Path('recovery/output.txt').read_text(encoding='utf-8'); assert 'recovered' in text, 'recovered'"
